title: michelia costata
intro: Michelia costata, also known as the golden medinilla or golden star, is a flowering plant species in the Medinilla family, characterized by its vibrant yellow flowers and glossy leaves. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where its leaves and flowers are used to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Michelia costata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Michelia costata are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
